translation_text: May not the Way (or Dao) of Heaven be compared to the (method of) bending a bow?
translation_text_raw: May not the Way (or Dao) of Heaven be compared to the (method of) bending a bow?

chinese_text: 高者抑之，下者舉之；有餘者損之，
translation_text: The (part of the bow) which was high is brought low, and what was low is raised up.
translation_text_raw: The (part of the bow) which was high is brought low, and what was low is raised up.

translation_text: (So Heaven) diminishes where there is superabundance, and supplements where there is deficiency.
translation_text_raw: (So Heaven) diminishes where there is superabundance, and supplements where there is deficiency.

translation_text: It is the Way of Heaven to diminish superabundance, and to supplement deficiency.
translation_text_raw: It is the Way of Heaven to diminish superabundance, and to supplement deficiency.

translation_text: It is not so with the way of man.
translation_text_raw: It is not so with the way of man.

translation_text: He takes away from those who have not enough to add to his own superabundance.
translation_text_raw: He takes away from those who have not enough to add to his own superabundance.

translation_text: Who can take his own superabundance and therewith serve all under heaven?
translation_text_raw: Who can take his own superabundance and therewith serve all under heaven?

chinese_text: 唯有道者。是以聖人為而不恃，
translation_text: Only he who is in possession of the Dao! Therefore the (ruling) sage acts without claiming the results as his;
translation_text_raw: Only he who is in possession of the Dao! Therefore the (ruling) sage acts without claiming the results as his;

translation_text: he achieves his merit and does not rest (arrogantly) in it:
translation_text_raw: he achieves his merit and does not rest (arrogantly) in it:

translation_text: - he does not wish to display his superiority.
translation_text_raw: - he does not wish to display his superiority.
